prd_updates.content:
Add under Plan Phase: **Plan in-review state** — When all epic tasks for a plan are closed, the plan status is **in_review** (not complete) until the user explicitly marks it complete. User can mark a plan complete from Evaluate (and optionally from Plan phase) via a "Mark complete" (or "Approve") action. Plan phase status filter and sort include **in_review** (order: planning → building → in_review → complete); plan cards show "In review" with a CTA to Evaluate for approval. Re-execute is available only for plans in **complete** state (after human approval).

Add under Evaluate Phase: **Unified review queue** — Evaluate Pending view shows (1) all pending feedback items and (2) all plans with status **in_review** in a single list (feedback cards and plan review cards). Resolved/Done view shows (1) resolved feedback and (2) complete plans. Plan review cards display plan title, plan id, task summary (e.g. "All 5 tasks done"), and primary action "Mark complete".

Add under Deliver Phase: **Deployment gate** — Deployment considers a plan "done" only when plan status is **complete** (human approved), not when merely **in_review** (all tasks closed).
prd_updates.change_log_entry: Document plan in-review state, unified Evaluate review queue, and Deliver gate requiring human-approved complete status.

prd_updates.content:
**Plan status derivation:** Plan status remains derived. When epic is not blocked and all epic tasks are closed (total > 0 and done === total), if **reviewedAt** is null then plan status is **in_review**; if reviewedAt is set then status is **complete**. Otherwise status is planning or building. When new tasks are added to an epic that was complete, **reviewedAt** is set to null so the plan re-enters **in_review** when those new tasks close.

**Evaluate unified list:** Pending view combines pending feedback and plans in **in_review**; Resolved/Done combines resolved feedback and plans in **complete**. Single review queue; filter counts (e.g. Pending) include both feedback and plans.

**Deliver gate:** Deployment gates require plan status **complete** (human approved), not just all tasks closed.
prd_updates.change_log_entry: Add plan status derivation (in_review vs complete via reviewedAt), unified Evaluate list behavior, and Deliver gate rule.

prd_updates.content: **Plan** (metadata / plans table): Add **reviewedAt**: string | null (ISO timestamp). Set when user marks plan complete; used in status derivation. When new tasks are added to a complete plan's epic, reviewedAt is cleared so the plan returns to **in_review** when all tasks are done again. Plan status derivation: planning = epic blocked; building = epic open with tasks pending; **in_review** = all tasks closed and reviewedAt null; **complete** = all tasks closed and reviewedAt set.
prd_updates.change_log_entry: Add Plan.reviewedAt and document plan status derivation including in_review and complete.

prd_updates.content:
**Plans:** Add **POST /projects/:id/plans/:planId/mark-complete** — Mark plan as complete (human review approved). Plan must have all epic tasks closed. Response: 200 with full Plan (status complete). Errors: 404 plan not found; 400 if not all tasks closed (e.g. "Plan has open tasks; cannot mark complete"). Idempotent when already complete (200, no-op).

GET /projects/:id/plans (existing): Response must include **reviewedAt** and derived status **in_review** or **complete**.

Optional: **GET /projects/:id/plans/review** returning `{ inReview: Plan[], complete: Plan[] }` for Evaluate; otherwise frontend filters client-side from existing list.

**WebSocket:** Emit **plan.updated** (or reuse existing plan invalidation) when a plan is marked complete so Evaluate and Plan phase refresh without full page reload.
prd_updates.change_log_entry: Add mark-complete endpoint, plans response reviewedAt/status, optional plans/review endpoint, and plan.updated WebSocket event.
